creator: dickey@invisible-island.net
text:
That's done in the ftp area.  The webpage points only to the current version.

See

ftp://ftp.invisible-island.net/rcs-blame
https://invisible-mirror.net/archives/rcs-blame/

I use this arrangement for all of my projects, to reduce the edits on the webpages.  The current-version is done with a script...
